name: Castlevania 64
description: Castlevania for the Nintendo 64 is the first 3D game in the Castlevania franchise.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Character Stages
options.description: Whether to include Reinhardt-only stages, Carrie-only stages, or both with or without branching paths at the end of Villa and Castle Center.

options.label: Stage Shuffle
options.description: Shuffles which stages appear in which stage slots.

options.label: Starting Stage
options.description: Which stage to start at if Stage Shuffle is turned on.

options.label: Warp Order
options.description: Arranges the warps in the warp menu in whichever stage order chosen, thereby changing the order they are unlocked in.

options.label: Sub Weapon Shuffle
options.description: Shuffles all sub-weapons in the game within each other in their own pool or in the main item pool.

options.label: Spare Keys
options.description: Puts an additional copy of every non-Special key item in the pool for every key item that there is.

options.label: Hard Item Pool
options.description: Replaces some items in the item pool with less valuable ones, to make the item pool sort of resemble Hard Mode in the PAL version.

options.label: Special1S Per Warp
options.description: Sets how many Special1 jewels are needed per warp menu option unlock.

options.label: Total Special1S
options.description: Sets how many Speical1 jewels are in the pool in total.

options.label: Draculas Condition
options.description: Sets the requirement for unlocking and opening the door to Dracula's chamber.

options.label: Percent Special2S Required
options.description: Percentage of Special2s required to enter Dracula's chamber when Dracula's Condition is Special2s.

options.label: Total Special2S
options.description: How many Speical2 jewels are in the pool in total when Dracula's Condition is Special2s.

options.label: Bosses Required
options.description: How many bosses need to be defeated to enter Dracula's chamber when Dracula's Condition is set to Bosses.

options.label: Carrie Logic
options.description: Adds the 2 checks inside Underground Waterway's crawlspace to the pool.

options.label: Hard Logic
options.description: Properly considers sequence break tricks in logic (i.e.

options.label: Multi Hit Breakables
options.description: Adds the items that drop from the objects that break in three hits to the pool.

options.label: Empty Breakables
options.description: Adds 9 check locations in the form of breakables that normally have nothing (all empty Forest coffins, etc.) and some additional Red Jewels and/or moneybags into the item pool to compensate.

options.label: Lizard Locker Items
options.description: Adds the 6 items inside Castle Center 2F's Lizard-man generators to the pool.

options.label: Shopsanity
options.description: Adds 7 one-time purchases from Renon's shop into the location pool.

options.label: Shop Prices
options.description: Randomizes the amount of gold each item costs in Renon's shop.

options.label: Minimum Gold Price
options.description: The lowest amount of gold an item can cost in Renon's shop, divided by 100.

options.label: Maximum Gold Price
options.description: The highest amount of gold an item can cost in Renon's shop, divided by 100.

options.label: Post Behemoth Boss
options.description: Sets which boss is fought in the vampire triplets' room in Castle Center by which characters after defeating Behemoth.

options.label: Room Of Clocks Boss
options.description: Sets which boss is fought at Room of Clocks by which characters.

options.label: Renon Fight Condition
options.description: Sets the condition on which the Renon fight will trigger.

options.label: Vincent Fight Condition
options.description: Sets the condition on which the vampire Vincent fight will trigger.

options.label: Bad Ending Condition
options.description: Sets the condition on which the currently-controlled character's Bad Ending will trigger.

options.label: Increase Item Limit
options.description: Increases the holding limit of usable items from 10 to 99 of each item.

options.label: Nerf Healing Items
options.description: Decreases the amount of health healed by Roast Chickens to 25%, Roast Beefs to 50%, and Healing Kits to 80%.

options.label: Loading Zone Heals
options.description: Whether end-of-level loading zones restore health and cure status aliments or not.

options.label: Invisible Items
options.description: Sets which items are visible in their locations and which are invisible until picked up.

options.label: Drop Previous Sub Weapon
options.description: When receiving a sub-weapon, the one you had before will drop behind you, so it can be taken back if desired.

options.label: Permanent Powerups
options.description: Replaces PowerUps with PermaUps, which upgrade your B weapon level permanently and will stay even after dying and/or continuing.

options.label: Ice Trap Percentage
options.description: Replaces a percentage of junk items with Ice Traps.

options.label: Ice Trap Appearance
options.description: What items Ice Traps can possibly be disguised as.

options.label: Disable Time Restrictions
options.description: Disables the restriction on every event and door that requires the current time to be within a specific range, so they can be triggered at any time.

options.label: Skip Gondolas
options.description: Makes jumping on and activating a gondola in Tunnel instantly teleport you to the other station, thereby skipping the entire three-minute ride.

options.label: Skip Waterway Blocks
options.description: Opens the door to the third switch in Underground Waterway from the start so that the jumping across floating brick platforms won't have to be done.

options.label: Countdown
options.description: Displays, near the HUD clock and below the health bar, the number of unobtained progression-marked items or the total check locations remaining in the stage you are currently in.

options.label: Big Toss
options.description: Makes every non-immobilizing damage source launch you as if you got hit by Behemoth's charge.

options.label: Panther Dash
options.description: Hold C-right at any time to sprint way faster.

options.label: Increase Shimmy Speed
options.description: Increases the speed at which characters shimmy left and right while hanging on ledges.

options.label: Window Color R
options.description: The red value for the background color of the text windows during gameplay.

options.label: Window Color G
options.description: The green value for the background color of the text windows during gameplay.

options.label: Window Color B
options.description: The blue value for the background color of the text windows during gameplay.

options.label: Window Color A
options.description: The alpha value for the background color of the text windows during gameplay.

options.label: Background Music
options.description: Randomizes or disables the music heard throughout the game.

options.label: Map Lighting
options.description: Randomizes the lighting color RGB values on every map during every time of day to be literally anything.

options.label: Fall Guard
options.description: Removes fall damage from landing too hard.

options.label: Cinematic Experience
options.description: Enables an unused film reel effect on every cutscene in the game.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
